---
title: "Pictus_adult_molecular"
output: html_document
---
---
title: "PICTUS_ADULT_MOLECULAR"
author: "Daniel Ritchie"
date: "2025-02-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(dplyr)
library(rptR)
library(lmPerm)
library(rptR)
```

```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_SC_TELO <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Pictus 2024 ADULTS/Excel files/TELB/DJR c,pictus STANDARD CURVE 10 2024.csv")

saveRDS(pictus_SC_TELO, file.path("input", "pictus_SC_TELO.rds"))

pictus_SC_TELO <-readRDS("input/pictus_SC_TELO.rds")
```

```{r}
# Calculate R-squared values for each group
r2_data <- data.frame(
  group = c("18s", "TELB"),
  r2 = c(0.99, 0.99) # Replace with your actual R² values
)

```

```{r}
## Graph of body temp and O2 by pop
pictus_SC_TELO_graph <- ggplot(pictus_SC_TELO, aes(x = log(`Given conc`), y= Cq, shape= Primer))+
   geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8, color = "black", fill = "white") +  # Use color and fill for outline
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Telb" = 21, "18s" = 24)) + 
  stat_smooth(method = "lm", se =FALSE, colour ="black", linewidth =0.7)+
geom_text(
    data = r2_data,
    aes(
      x = 2, y = c(24, 17), # Adjust positions for each group
      label = paste0("R² = ", r2)
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4
  ) +
  xlab("log(Relative DNA concentration)")+
  theme_classic()
pictus_SC_TELO_graph
```

```{r}
ggsave("plots/SC_CHAPTER3.png", pictus_SC_TELO_graph,
  width = 10,
  height = 10,
  units = "cm")
```


```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_SC_TERT <- read_csv("~/Desktop/phd/Documents/Chapter 3/Datasheets/DJR_SC_Final.csv")

saveRDS(pictus_SC_TERT, file.path("input", "pictus_SC_TERT.rds"))

pictus_SC_TERT <-readRDS("input/pictus_SC_TERT.rds")
```

```{r}
# Calculate R-squared values for each group
r2_data <- data.frame(
  group = c("GAPDH", "TERT"),
  r2 = c(0.99, 0.99) # Replace with your actual R² values
)

```

```{r}
## Graph of body temp and O2 by pop
pictus_SC_TERT_graph <- ggplot(pictus_SC_TERT, aes(x = log(`Given conc`), y= Cq, shape= Primer))+
   geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8, color = "black", fill = "white") +  # Use color and fill for outline
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("TERT" = 21, "GAPDH" = 24)) + 
  stat_smooth(method = "lm", se =FALSE, colour ="black", linewidth =0.7)+

  xlab("log(Relative DNA concentration)")+
  theme_classic()
pictus_SC_TERT_graph
```
```{r}
ggsave("SCTERT_CHAPTER3.png", pictus_SC_TERT_graph,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  units = "cm")
```


```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_GS_adult <- read_csv("~/Desktop/phd/Documents/Chapter 3/Datasheets/Adult_2024_GS.csv")

saveRDS(pictus_GS_adult, file.path("input", "pictus_GS_adult.rds"))

pictus_GS_adult <-readRDS("input/pictus_GS_adult.rds")
```

```{r}

library(irr)

# Separate Telomere and 18s data
telomere_data <- pictus_GS_adult[pictus_GS_adult$Amplicon == "TELB", c("Rep.1", "Rep.2", "Rep.3", "Rep.4")]
s18_data <- pictus_GS_adult[pictus_GS_adult$Amplicon == "18s", c("Rep.1", "Rep.2", "Rep.3", "Rep.4")]

# Quick CV calculations only
telomere_intra <- mean(apply(telomere_data, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm=TRUE)/mean(x, na.rm=TRUE)*100), na.rm=TRUE)
telomere_inter <- sd(rowMeans(telomere_data, na.rm=TRUE), na.rm=TRUE)/mean(rowMeans(telomere_data, na.rm=TRUE), na.rm=TRUE)*100

s18_intra <- mean(apply(s18_data, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm=TRUE)/mean(x, na.rm=TRUE)*100), na.rm=TRUE)
s18_inter <- sd(rowMeans(s18_data, na.rm=TRUE), na.rm=TRUE)/mean(rowMeans(s18_data, na.rm=TRUE), na.rm=TRUE)*100

cat("Telomere - Intra:", round(telomere_intra, 2), "%  Inter:", round(telomere_inter, 2), "%\n")
cat("18s      - Intra:", round(s18_intra, 2), "%  Inter:", round(s18_inter, 2), "%\n")

```

```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_GS_TERT_adult <- read_csv("~/Desktop/phd/Documents/Chapter 3/Datasheets/Adult_2024_TERT_GS.csv")

saveRDS(pictus_GS_TERT_adult, file.path("input", "pictus_GS_TERT_adult.rds"))

pictus_GS_TERT_adult <-readRDS("input/pictus_GS_TERT_adult.rds")
```

```{r}


library(irr)

TERT_data <- pictus_GS_TERT_adult[pictus_GS_TERT_adult$Amplicon == "TERT", c("Rep.1", "Rep.2", "Rep.3")]
GAPDH_data <- pictus_GS_TERT_adult[pictus_GS_TERT_adult$Amplicon == "GAPDH", c("Rep.1", "Rep.2", "Rep.3")]


# 1. INTRA-ASSAY CV (within each run)


# GAPDH
gapdh_intra_cv <- mean(apply(GAPDH_data, 1, function(x) {
  sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(x, na.rm = TRUE) * 100
}), na.rm = TRUE)

# TERT
tert_intra_cv <- mean(apply(TERT_data, 1, function(x) {
  sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(x, na.rm = TRUE) * 100
}), na.rm = TRUE)


# 2. INTER-ASSAY CV (across runs)


# GAPDH
gapdh_means <- rowMeans(GAPDH_data, na.rm = TRUE)
gapdh_inter_cv <- sd(gapdh_means, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(gapdh_means, na.rm = TRUE) * 100

# TERT
tert_means <- rowMeans(TERT_data, na.rm = TRUE)
tert_inter_cv <- sd(tert_means, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(tert_means, na.rm = TRUE) * 100


# 3. PRINT RESULTS

cat("\n===============================\n")
cat("    qPCR REPRODUCIBILITY\n")
cat("===============================\n\n")

cat("GAPDH:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Intra-assay CV:  %.2f%%\n", gapdh_intra_cv))
cat(sprintf("  Inter-assay CV:  %.2f%%\n\n", gapdh_inter_cv))

cat("TERT:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Intra-assay CV:  %.2f%%\n", tert_intra_cv))
cat(sprintf("  Inter-assay CV:  %.2f%%\n\n", tert_inter_cv))


```





```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_IQ_TERT <- read_csv("~/Desktop/phd/Documents/Chapter 3/Datasheets/Pictus_Qubit_IQ.csv")

saveRDS(pictus_IQ_TERT, file.path("input", "pictus_IQ_TERT.rds"))

pictus_IQ_TERT <-readRDS("input/pictus_IQ_TERT.rds")
```

```{r}
JAN_IQ_model <- lmer(Jan_IQ ~Treatment*Clade +(1|Population) , data =pictus_IQ_TERT)

summary(JAN_IQ_model)
anova(JAN_IQ_model)

#emmeans(change_model, pairwise ~ Treatment*Clade)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

## one position object for everything
pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.7)                       # for the boxes
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.7,           # for the points
                            jitter.width = 0.15)

IQ_boxplot_JAN <- ggplot(pictus_IQ_TERT ,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = Jan_IQ,
           fill = Treatment)) +          # fill = interior colour
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6,
               position = pd,
               outlier.shape = NA) +
 geom_point(position = pjd,
           size      = 1.8,
           alpha     = 0.4,
           colour    = "black",   
           shape     = 16)   +    

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "Inital RNA IQ") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )
IQ_boxplot_JAN
```

```{r}
May_IQ_model <- lmer(May_IQ ~Treatment*Clade +(1|Population) , data =pictus_IQ_TERT)

summary(May_IQ_model)
anova(May_IQ_model)

#emmeans(change_model, pairwise ~ Treatment*Clade)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

## one position object for everything
pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.7)                       # for the boxes
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.7,           # for the points
                            jitter.width = 0.15)

IQ_boxplot_MAY <- ggplot(pictus_IQ_TERT ,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = May_IQ,
           fill = Treatment)) +          # fill = interior colour
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6,
               position = pd,
               outlier.shape = NA) +
 geom_point(position = pjd,
           size      = 1.8,
           alpha     = 0.4,
           colour    = "black",   
           shape     = 16)   +    

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "Final RNA IQ") +
 theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )
IQ_boxplot_MAY
```


```{r}
iq.figure <- ggpubr::ggarrange(   IQ_boxplot_JAN,IQ_boxplot_MAY,
                                         ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
                                         widths = c(10, 10),
                                         heights = c(10, 10))  +
  annotate("text", x = c(0.024,  0.5), y = c(0.98,  0.98), label = c("A)", "B)"),
           size = 4, fontface = "bold")

iq.figure 

```


```{r}
ggsave("plots/IQ.tiff", iq.figure , width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```












```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- read_csv("~/Desktop/phd/Documents/Chapter 3/Datasheets/ADULT_TELO_FULL.csv")

saveRDS(pictus_ADULT_TELO, file.path("input", "pictus_ADULT_TELO.rds"))

pictus_ADULT_TELO <-readRDS("input/pictus_ADULT_TELO.rds")

pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  mutate(
    Membrane_poten_Jan = MTO_JAN / MTG_JAN,
    Membrane_poten_May = MTO_MAY / MTG_MAY,
    Membrane_poten_Change = (MTO_MAY / MTG_MAY) - (MTO_JAN / MTG_JAN)
  )
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  mutate(
    Superoxide_Jan = MSR_JAN / MTG_JAN,
    Superoxide_May = MSR_MAY / MTG_MAY,
    Superoxide_Change = (MSR_MAY / MTG_MAY) - (MSR_JAN / MTG_JAN),
    Density_Change =(MTG_MAY-MTG_JAN)
  )



# 1. Put Mass + SVL into long format
pictus_long <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, Population,
         Mass_JAN, SVL_JAN,
         Mass_MAY, SVL_MAY) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Mass_JAN, SVL_JAN, Mass_MAY, SVL_MAY),
               names_to = c("Trait", "Month"),
               names_pattern = "(.*)_(JAN|MAY)",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Trait, values_from = Value)

# 2. Calculate BCI per Population × Month
BCI_data <- pictus_long %>%
  mutate(lnMass = log(Mass),
         lnSVL  = log(SVL)) %>%
  group_by(Population, Month) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    df <- .x %>% filter(!is.na(lnMass), !is.na(lnSVL))
    fit <- lm(lnMass ~ lnSVL, data = df)
    df$BCI_raw <- residuals(fit)
    df$BCI <- as.numeric(scale(df$BCI_raw))
    df
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3. Go back to wide format with both raw + standardized residuals
BCI_wide <- BCI_data %>%
   dplyr::select(ID, Population, Month, BCI_raw, BCI) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month,
              values_from = c(BCI_raw, BCI),
              names_sep = "_")

# 4. Join back to main dataset
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  left_join(BCI_wide, by = c("ID", "Population"))

## Create D for SVL
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$SVL_JAN       # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$SVL_MAY       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_SVL <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_SVL <- D_SVL

## Create D for MASS
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Mass_JAN       # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Mass_MAY       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_Mass <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_Mass <- D_Mass


## Create D for BCI
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$BCI_JAN      # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$BCI_MAY      # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_BCI <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_BCI <- D_BCI

## Create D for rTL
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$JAN_RTL       # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$MAY_RTL       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_RTL <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_RTL <- D_RTL

## Create D for TERT
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$JAN       # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$MAY       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_TERT <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_TERT <- D_TERT

## Create D for Superoxide
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Superoxide_Jan      # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Superoxide_May       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_superoxide <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_superoxide <- D_superoxide

## Create D for Membrane Potential
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Membrane_poten_Jan
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Membrane_poten_May
S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_membrane_poten <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_membrane_poten <- D_membrane_poten


pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  mutate(MTG_JAN_sc = scale(MTG_JAN))
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  mutate(MTG_MAY_sc = scale(MTG_MAY))
```













```{r}
library(ggplot2)

pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.8) 
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8, jitter.width = 0.05)

telo_plot <- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = log(MAY_RTL_NEW),
           fill = Treatment,
           shape = Treatment)) +     
  # jittered points
  geom_point(position = pjd,
             size      = 2.5,
             alpha     = 0.2,
             colour    = "black") +

  # mean ± SE
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),   # map fill to treatment
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    size = 2,
    width = 0,
    position = pd
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),   # mean point with treatment color
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 21,              # filled circle
    size = 3,
    colour = "black",        # outline
    position = pd
  ) +

  annotate("text", x =0.825, y = 1, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
annotate("text", x =1.175, y = 1, label = "b", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =1.825, y = 1, label = "ab", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =2.175, y = 1, label = "ab", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "log(Final rTL)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )

telo_plot

```

```{r}
ggsave("plots/telo_plot.tiff", telo_plot, width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)
```



## TElomere change model




```{r}
change_model <- lmer(log(MAY_RTL_NEW) ~ log(JAN_RTL_NEW) +Treatment*Clade +(1|Population) , data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)
summary(change_model)
anova(change_model)
emmeans(change_model, pairwise ~ Clade*Treatment)
icc(change_model)
```


```{r}
library(performance)
check_model(change_model)
```


```{r}
library(MuMIn)
r.squaredGLMM(change_model)
```

```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)   # adds p‑values & df
library(DHARMa)     # optional but recommended


## diagnostics
simulateResiduals(change_model) |> plot()

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(effectsize)
library(boot)

# Log-transform MAY_RTL
df <- d_params
  
#Filter out NAs for Treatment
df_trt <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(breadth) & !is.na(Treatment))

# Split groups
x_trt <- df_trt$breadth[df_trt$Treatment == "Warm"]
y_trt <- df_trt$breadth[df_trt$Treatment == "Cool"]

# Cohen's d
d_trt <- cohens_d(x_trt, y_trt, pooled_sd = TRUE)
d_trt
# Bootstrap function
boot_trt_fun <- function(data, indices) {
  x <- data$breadth[data$Treatment == "Warm"][indices]
  y <- data$breadth[data$Treatment == "Cool"][indices]
  cohens_d(x, y, pooled_sd = TRUE)$Cohens_d
}

set.seed(123)
boot_trt <- boot(df_trt, statistic = boot_trt_fun, R = 3000)
```


```{r}
# 95% CI
boot.ci(boot_trt, type = "perc")
# Filter out NAs for Clade
df_clade <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(breadth) & !is.na(Clade))

# Split groups
x_clade <- df_clade$breadth[df_clade$Clade == "North"]
y_clade <- df_clade$breadth[df_clade$Clade == "South"]

# Cohen's d
d_clade <- cohens_d(x_clade, y_clade, pooled_sd = TRUE)
d_clade

# Bootstrap CI
boot_clade_fun <- function(data, indices) {
  x <- data$breadth[data$Clade == "North"][indices]
  y <- data$breadth[data$Clade == "South"][indices]
  cohens_d(x, y, pooled_sd = TRUE)$Cohens_d
}

set.seed(123)
boot_clade <- boot(df_clade, statistic = boot_clade_fun, R = 3000)
boot.ci(boot_clade, type = "perc")

```





# TELOMERASE EXPRESSION 



```{r}
library(ggplot2)

pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.6) 
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.6, jitter.width = 0.1)

tert_plot <- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = log(MAY_NEW),
           fill = Treatment,
           shape = Treatment)) +     

  # jittered points
  geom_point(position = pjd,
             size      = 2.5,
             alpha     = 0.2,
             colour    = "black") +

  # mean ± SE
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),   # map fill to treatment
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    width = 0,
    size=2,
    position = pd
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),   # mean point with treatment color
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 21,              # filled circle
    size = 3,
    colour = "black",        # outline
    position = pd
  ) +
 ylim(-1.1, 2.2)+
 annotate("text", x =0.825, y = 2, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
annotate("text", x =1.175, y = 2, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =1.825, y = 2, label = "b", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =2.175, y = 2, label = "b", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "log(TERT expression)") +
  theme_classic() +
 theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )
tert_plot

```

```{r}
ggsave("plots/tert_plot.tiff", tert_plot, width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)
```




```{r}
r.squaredGLMM(TERT_change_model)
```



```{r}
TERT_change_model <- lmer(log(MAY_NEW) ~log(JAN_NEW)+Treatment*Clade +(1|Population) , data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)

summary(TERT_change_model)
anova(TERT_change_model)

lsmeans(TERT_change_model, pairwise ~ Clade)
```

```{r}
coef_table <- summary(TERT_change_model)$coefficients
coef_table
```


```{r}
corr. <- aovp(MAY ~Treatment*Population , data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)

summary(corr.)
```


```{r}
corr.JAN.TERT <- cor.test(log(pictus_ADULT_TELO$Superoxide_May), log(pictus_ADULT_TELO$MAY_RTL))

print(corr.JAN.TERT)
```


```{r}
JANTELOJANTERT <- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO, aes(x = JAN_RTL_NEW, y = MAY_RTL_NEW)) +
    geom_point() +
 geom_smooth(method = "lm", se =FALSE, colour="black") +    
    labs(title = "(f)") +


    xlab("log(Final Superoxide)") +
    ylab("log(Final rTL)") +

    theme_classic()

JANTELOJANTERT
```

```{r}
ggsave("plots/JANTELOJANTERT.tiff", JANTELOJANTERT, width = 4, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

## Mitochondrial ROS model




```{r}
r.squaredGLMM(MSR_JAN_model)
```



```{r}
MSR_JAN_model <- lmer(log(Superoxide_May) ~log(Superoxide_Jan)+Treatment*Clade +(1|Population), data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)

summary(MSR_JAN_model)
anova(MSR_JAN_model)

emmeans(MSR_JAN_model, pairwise ~ Treatment)
```

```{r}
corr. <- aovp(Superoxide_May ~Treatment*Population , data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)

summary(corr.)
```






```{r}
library(ggplot2)

pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.6) 
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.6, jitter.width = 0.1)

ros_plot <- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = log(Superoxide_May),
           fill = Treatment,
           shape = Treatment)) +     

  # jittered points
  geom_point(position = pjd,
             size      = 2.5,
             alpha     = 0.2,
             colour    = "black") +

  # mean ± SE
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),   # map fill to treatment
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    width = 0,
    size=2,
    position = pd
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),   # mean point with treatment color
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 21,              # filled circle
    size = 3,
    colour = "black",        # outline
    position = pd
  ) +
  ylim(-2.0, 0.2)+
annotate("text", x =0.825, y = 0, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
annotate("text", x =1.175, y = 0, label = "b", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =1.825, y = 0, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =2.175, y = 0, label = "b", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "log(Superoxide)") +
   theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ros_plot

```

```{r}
ggsave("plots/ros_plot.tiff", ros_plot, width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)

```





## Membrane potent model



```{r}
r.squaredGLMM(mito_model)
```

```{r}

mito_model <- lmer(MTG_MAY_sc ~ MTG_JAN_sc+Treatment*Clade +(1|Population), data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)

summary(mito_model)
anova(mito_model)
```







```{r}

library(ggplot2)

pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.8) 
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8, jitter.width = 0.05)

mem_plot <- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = MTG_MAY_sc,
           fill = Treatment,
           shape = Treatment)) +     
  # jittered points
  geom_point(position = pjd,
             size      = 2.5,
             alpha     = 0.2,
             colour    = "black") +

  # mean ± SE
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    size = 2,
    width = 0,
    position = pd
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    colour = "black",
    position = pd
  ) +
annotate("text", x =0.825, y = 3, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
annotate("text", x =1.175, y = 3, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =1.825, y = 3, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  annotate("text", x =2.175, y = 3, label = "a", size = 6, color = "black") + 
  
  scale_y_continuous(
  labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01, width = 6)
)+

  #scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "Mitochondrial content") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )

mem_plot
```


```{r}
ggsave("plots/mem_plot.tiff", mem_plot, width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
library(gridExtra)
molecular.figure <- grid.arrange(telo_boxplot, tert_boxplot,  mem_boxplot,ros_boxplot, ncol= 2)
```


```{r}
view(molecular.figure)
```

```{r}
telo_plot <- telo_plot + coord_fixed(ratio = 3/4)   # height = 3, width = 4
tert_lot <- tert_plot + coord_fixed(ratio = 3/4) 
ros_lot <- ros_plot + coord_fixed(ratio = 3/4) 
mem_lot <- mem_plot + coord_fixed(ratio = 3/4) 
```


```{r}
molecular.figure <- ggpubr::ggarrange(
  telo_plot, tert_plot,
  mem_plot, ros_plot,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
  widths = c(1, 1),    # relative widths of columns
  heights = c(1, 1)    # relative heights of rows
) +
  annotate("text",
           x = c(0.024, 0.5, 0.024, 0.5),
           y = c(0.98, 0.98, 0.5, 0.5),
           label = c("A)", "B)", "C)", "D)"),
           size = 4, fontface = "bold")
molecular.figure
```


```{r}
ggsave("plots/molecular.figure.tiff", molecular.figure, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```



## MORPHOLOGY







```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# 1. Grab only numeric columns (and keep ID for plotting if needed)
numeric_data <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric), ID)

# 2. Pivot longer (exclude BCI_MAY itself to avoid self-plot)
long_numeric <- numeric_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(ID, D_RTL),
               names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Value")

# 3. Plot BCI_MAY vs each numeric variable
ggplot(long_numeric, aes(x = D_RTL, y = Value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~ Variable, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "BCI_MAY.y vs other numeric variables",
       x = "BCI_MAY.y", y = "Value")

```




```{r}
SVL_final <- lmer(D_SVL ~ MAY_RTL+Treatment*Clade + (1|Population), data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)
summary(SVL_final)
```

```{r}
# Keep only rows with non-missing D_SVL and MAY
complete_data <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  filter(!is.na(CHANGE_SVL) & !is.na(MAY))

# Fit model
resid_model <- lm(CHANGE_SVL ~ MAY, data = complete_data)

# Add residuals back to the complete dataset
complete_data$resid_D_SVL <- resid(resid_model)

chris_model <- lmer(resid_D_SVL~D_RTL +Treatment*Clade + (1|Population), data =complete_data)
summary(chris_model)
```

```{r}
SVL_TERT<-ggplot(complete_data, aes(x = resid_D_SVL, y =MAY_RTL)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  #facet_wrap(~ Clade) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs( x = "Residual SVL TERT",
       y = "RTL D") +
  #facet_grid(~Population)+
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
SVL_TERT
```



```{r}

library(ggplot2)

pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.8) 
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8, jitter.width = 0.05)

SVL_plot <- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = CHANGE_SVL,
           fill = Treatment,
           shape = Treatment)) +     
  # jittered points
  geom_point(position = pjd,
             size      = 2.5,
             alpha     = 0.2,
             colour    = "black") +

  # mean ± SE
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    size = 2,
    width = 0,
    position = pd
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    colour = "black",
    position = pd
  ) +

  
  scale_y_continuous(
  labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01, width = 6)
)+

  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "SVL change (cm)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )

SVL_plot


```


```{r}
SVL_TERT<-ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO, aes(x = MAY, y =D_SVL)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  #facet_wrap(~ Clade) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs( x = "TERT expression (MAY)",
       y = "SVL Change (cm)") +
  #facet_grid(~Population)+
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
SVL_TERT
```

```{r}

library(ggplot2)

pd  <- position_dodge(width = 0.8) 
pjd <- position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8, jitter.width = 0.05)

BCI_plot <- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO,
       aes(x = Clade,
           y = D_BCI,
           fill = Treatment,
           shape = Treatment)) +     
  # jittered points
  geom_point(position = pjd,
             size      = 2.5,
             alpha     = 0.2,
             colour    = "black") +

  # mean ± SE
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    size = 2,
    width = 0,
    position = pd
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = Treatment),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    colour = "black",
    position = pd
  ) +

  
  scale_y_continuous(
  labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01, width = 6)
)+

  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Warm = "#9E2A2F",
                               Cool = "#4A90E2")) +
  labs(x = "Clade", y = "BCI change") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),   # black axis titles
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),   # black tick labels
    axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "black"),  # thicker axis lines
    legend.position = "none"
  )

BCI_plot


```


```{r}

BCI_model <- lmer(D_BCI ~MAY_RTL+Treatment+Clade + (1|Population), data =pictus_ADULT_TELO)

summary(BCI_model)
#anova(Membrane_model)
#emmeans(BCI_model, pairwise ~ Treatment)
```

```{r}
BCI_mem<- ggplot(pictus_ADULT_TELO, aes(x = Membrane_poten_May, y =D_BCI)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  #facet_wrap(~ Clade) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs( x = "Membrane potential",
       y = "BCI Change") +
  #facet_grid(~Population)+
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
BCI_mem
```

```{r}
morph.figure <- ggpubr::ggarrange(
  SVL_plot, BCI_plot,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 2,
  widths = c(1, 1),    # relative widths of columns
  heights = c(1, 1)    # relative heights of rows
) +
  annotate("text",
           x = c(0.024, 0.024),
           y = c(0.98, 0.55),
           label = c("A)", "B)"),
           size = 4, fontface = "bold")
morph.figure
```

```{r}
ggsave("plots/morph.figure.tiff", morph.figure, width = 4, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```
